headline: Fifth Third Closes Fannie Mae DUS® Acquisition; Strengthens Multifamily Lending Capabilities
summary: CINCINNATI, May 07, 2026--Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) announced closing of a transaction to acquire Mechanics Bank’s Delegated Underwriting and Servicing (DUS®) business line, including an experienced lending team, and a $1.8 billion unpaid principal balance servicing portfolio.
